message:
chore(deps): update Cargo.lock for toon-to-tru workspace migration

Lockfile reflects the rename of the toon dependency to tru (v0.2.0,
local workspace path) aligning with binary naming conventions that
avoid collision with coreutils `tr`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -759,10 +759,10 @@ dependencies = [
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
  "tokio",
  "toml 0.9.11+spec-1.1.0",
- "toon",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-appender",
  "tracing-subscriber",
+ "tru",
  "unicode-normalization",
  "unicode-width",
  "urlencoding",
@@ -5771,23 +5771,6 @@ version = "1.0.6+spec-1.1.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "ab16f14aed21ee8bfd8ec22513f7287cd4a91aa92e44edfe2c17ddd004e92607"
 
-[[package]]
-name = "toon"
-version = "0.1.3"
-source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust#336bbe0a622f5ca8a1a9b5145cf197349a14f67e"
-dependencies = [
- "anyhow",
- "chrono",
- "clap",
- "clap_complete",
- "serde",
- "serde_json",
- "thiserror 2.0.18",
- "tracing",
- "tracing-subscriber",
- "vergen-gix",
-]
-
 [[package]]
 name = "tower"
 version = "0.5.3"
@@ -5919,6 +5902,22 @@ dependencies = [
  "tracing-serde",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "tru"
+version = "0.2.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "anyhow",
+ "chrono",
+ "clap",
+ "clap_complete",
+ "serde",
+ "serde_json",
+ "thiserror 2.0.18",
+ "tracing",
+ "tracing-subscriber",
+ "vergen-gix",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "try-lock"
 version = "0.2.5"
